reviews.review_description: this is the worst review i have ever given the game is so trash graphics are terrible game play is terrible and the reviews are definitely purchased by the creators of the game as this game is a lie

developer_response.body: Hi there. We’re sorry to hear you didn't enjoy your experience. As an independent developer, we assure you that every single review for Play Five is from a real player who enjoys our game. We created a completely free demo specifically so that anyone can test the graphics, physics, and gameplay for themselves before spending a single cent. If you have specific, constructive feedback on how we can improve the mechanics, we’d love to hear it, just contact us on our Discord. Thank you for trying the demo!

reviews.review_description:
The recent update really changed the game. New slam dunks add a lot of excitement, and gameplay now requires proper timing and skill instead of feeling too easy.
What stands out now is team management. You can customize your own team and also set up opponent teams, making it possible to play against realistic lineups instead of random players.
You can recreate real matchups, tweak difficulty, and shape the game exactly how you want, which keeps it fresh.

This VR basketball game is off to a fantastic start! The ability to jump and dunk adds a whole new level of excitement, and the free throw mechanics feel incredibly smooth and satisfying. There are also fun game modes to keep things fresh, with some really great sequences and actions that make you feel like you're on the court.

It’s already a solid experience, and with such a strong foundation, the potential for growth is huge. If you’re a basketball fan or just love sports in VR, this is definitely one to watch! 🏀🔥

Taking into account the price, Basketball is a great little VR game packed with features such as full league play, team customisation and being able to tweak the difficulty to suit you perfectly.

I can understand the odd negative comment from someone who's clearly too lazy to click the menu, but anyone who's spent some time with this game will see there's plenty of ball for your bucks

If it was "expensive" maybe 3-4*, but for this price it's an easy 5* experience.

Since I bought it, it's been my favorite game. My brother and I toss a coin to see who plays first. What a thrill, I feel like a basketball champion. The best part is the dunks, the guy flies normally, and can even hang on the basket. The gameplay itself is a masterpiece. And of course, you can win leagues.

reviews.review_title: best basketball game ON THE STORE!!!
reviews.review_description:
I LOVE THIS GAME SO MUCH I CANT EVEN
 EXPLAIN. YOU CAN MAKE YOUR OWN, TEAM, MAKE YOUR OWN PLAYERS, AND EVEN MORE!!! FIVE OUT OF FIVE DEF WOULD SEND TO EVERYONE OF MY FRIENDS IF I HAD ENOUGH MONEY (dev, if u respond pls give discord server link)

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot your comment, we are so happy that you like the game. Here is the link for Discord https://discord.gg/rKujz8XqSw, I'm sorry for that late response, I've missed this Discord question completely.

reviews.review_description: I’m not even a huge basketball fan, but this game is so much fun! It’s easy to pick up and play, and the VR environment makes it feel like you’re right there on the court. Definitely worth trying, even if you’re not a hardcore hoops fan!

reviews.review_title: A Slam Dunk in Virtual Reality!
reviews.review_description: Basketball VR is an incredibly immersive experience that brings the excitement of the game to life in a whole new way. The physics are spot on, from the way the ball bounces off the rim to the feeling of shooting a three-pointer from the corner. Every pass, dribble, and dunk feels realistic and intuitive. The gameplay is excellently organized, with a variety of modes to suit all playstyles, whether you prefer a casual shootaround or competitive 5v5 games.

reviews.review_title: A Virtual Basketball Experience Like No
reviews.review_description: I’ve played plenty of VR sports games, but none quite like Basketball VR. The game physics are so finely tuned that I feel like a pro player when I’m dribbling, shooting, and dunking. The ball's trajectory feels completely natural, and you can really feel the weight of it as you handle the rock. The gameplay is brilliantly structured, with clear objectives and intuitive controls that make it easy to jump right into the action. And let's not forget the ability to dunk — there's nothing more satisfying than slamming the ball through the hoop, especially in VR! Basketball VR is a must-have for any hoops fan.

The gameplay is smooth and exceptionally well-organized, with no clutter or confusion. Whether you’re diving into an intense match or just practicing your shots, the flow of the game is seamless. The atmosphere in the virtual stadium is electrifying — the crowd’s energy make you feel like you’re playing in a top-tier arena. The cherry on top is the ability to dunk! The pure joy of soaring through the air and slamming the ball into the hoop is unmatched.

reviews.review_title: This game is a slam dunk!
reviews.review_description: This game is a slam dunk! The physics feel realistic, the shooting mechanics are smooth, and the immersion is insane. It truly feels like I'm playing on a real court. Multiplayer is an absolute blast—trash-talking in VR makes it even better!
I found out how to make the player move

developer_response.body: Great, just remember that you can always join us on Discord and suggest improvements.

reviews.review_description: Finally I can play offline 5-5 matches. The ball physics feels really good. I like the vibrations, it makes the ball feel more real. Passing requires some thinking, I'm glad that Quest controllers are tracked properly, this allows for throwing from behind of the head. Hint for everyone - don't just pass, move before passing so your teammates can reposition and you will get more options. If you're fast enough, then you can also block the opponent shots, but it's not easy without slow motion. Don't use precise mode before training it, it's not that easy when there is no assistance, fortunately passes are always assisted. The commentator is not brazen, but it's a nice addition. The special effects and hats are not for me, but I imagine people would like to use them.

reviews.review_title: I like this game very much
reviews.review_description: I really liked the game because of basketball, which I like very much, the details put into this game and the fact that you don't have to be a professional but can just play for fun.

reviews.review_title: I can play it for hours
reviews.review_description:
Lots of fun. At the beginning requires some training with throwing the ball. 
Action is dynamic and addictive. 
Funny thing is that you can adjust your height and become taller than other players.
There is also hidden feature - before starting the match you can actually grab the ball and train with some shots.

It feels really cool playing 5-5 games with AI. There are also some other small games. I would say, that at the beginning it's a bit confusing on how the switching between players works, but after some time I understand the intention and I've just got used to it. BTW. this is my second game from this Developer.
